prompt: Create a high fashion editorial magazine cover inspired by luxury fashion publications. Use the reference image of the female subject. Black and white portrait photography with a clean off white studio background. Subject is posed confidently from a low angle, looking slightly upward, soft parted lips, tousled wavy hair with natural volume. Outfit includes a dark turtleneck layered under a textured tailored plaid blazer. Lighting is soft yet dramatic, creating sculpted facial shadows and elegant contrast. Magazine layout design with oversized serif masthead text at the top reading “VOGUE”, partially hidden behind the subject’s head. Minimal premium typography across the page. Add side text “FASHION”, issue date “2026 MAY”, left side headline “27 DIFFERENT STYLES”, and bold bottom right cover line “LOOK FAMOUS”. Include a small red translucent square overlay on one eye area with the word “CATCHY”. Style should feel premium, modern, cinematic, clean composition, sharp focus, ultra realistic skin texture, editorial luxury aesthetic, balanced negative space, timeless fashion cover design. Vertical magazine ratio, high resolution.
promptEn: Create a high fashion editorial magazine cover inspired by luxury fashion publications. Use the reference image of the female subject. Black and white portrait photography with a clean off white studio background. Subject is posed confidently from a low angle, looking slightly upward, soft parted lips, tousled wavy hair with natural volume. Outfit includes a dark turtleneck layered under a textured tailored plaid blazer. Lighting is soft yet dramatic, creating sculpted facial shadows and elegant contrast. Magazine layout design with oversized serif masthead text at the top reading “VOGUE”, partially hidden behind the subject’s head. Minimal premium typography across the page. Add side text “FASHION”, issue date “2026 MAY”, left side headline “27 DIFFERENT STYLES”, and bold bottom right cover line “LOOK FAMOUS”. Include a small red translucent square overlay on one eye area with the word “CATCHY”. Style should feel premium, modern, cinematic, clean composition, sharp focus, ultra realistic skin texture, editorial luxury aesthetic, balanced negative space, timeless fashion cover design. Vertical magazine ratio, high resolution.
promptZh: 创作一张灵感源自奢华时尚刊物的高级时尚社论杂志封面。使用 女性主体 的参考图像。黑白肖像摄影，背景为干净的米白色摄影棚背景。主体以低角度自信地摆出姿势，目光微向上方，双唇微张，凌乱的波浪卷发自然蓬松。服装包括一件深色高领毛衣，外搭一件有质感的定制格纹西装外套。光线柔和而富有戏剧性，营造出轮廓分明的面部阴影和优雅的对比度。杂志排版设计，顶部为超大衬线字体刊头，文字为“VOGUE”，部分被主体头部遮挡。页面上采用极简的高级排版。添加侧边文字“FASHION”，发行日期“2026 MAY”，左侧标题“27 DIFFERENT STYLES”，以及右下角加粗的封面标语“LOOK FAMOUS”。在其中一只眼睛区域添加一个小的红色半透明方形覆盖层，文字为“CATCHY”。风格应体现高级感、现代感、电影感、构图简洁、焦点清晰、超逼真的皮肤纹理、社论奢华美学、平衡的留白，以及永恒的时尚封面设计。垂直杂志比例，高分辨率。
